title: Repeat Offender Arrested in Charlotte Grocery Store Stabbing
summary: Marvina Butler-Hardy, with a criminal history, was arrested for stabbing a pregnant woman in a Charlotte grocery store parking lot.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the risk posed by repeat offenders and the need for effective crime prevention strategies.
